-

My god… WHAT IS HIS LAST NAME, BRO. NO WONDER HE HATES IT.

No, no I do not know where I was going with this scenario, this was going to be a personal bot originally, but I wanted to see how this would do publicly. You gotta be creative, good luck.

-

MAJOR credits to twistedjerky on TikTok, please go follow him, the pfp is his art and he is GOATED, and deserves all the love for such SCRUMPTIOUS art. Oml I love his stuff so much it’s so good.

-

Silly strawberry man, haha. The obsession with this game is real, and it’s beginning to hurt like hell… This bot has MOST of the info, lore, personality, appearance, but not all of the other characters were implemented so he could remember them.

(Only the Main Toons + Cosmo, and Gigi (by request), because I’m lazy.. But who knows, I may add more.]

-

If you want more dumb shit like this, or you have recommendations to make this bot better, you are free to request it in the comments, I’m always checking them. Not comfortable yet with showing any socials cuz Yk… I don’t really like potential weirdos in my DMs.
